purpose: React is a JavaScript library for building user interfaces with declarative, component-based architecture. This is a monorepo (via Yarn workspaces) containing the core React packages.

key_files.role: Monorepo root configuration with workspaces, build scripts, and dev dependencies

purpose: Test fixture demonstrating React View Transitions API integration with server-side rendering, navigation interception, and transition type support.

key_files.name: package.json
key_files.role: Project metadata, dev/runtime dependencies, build and dev scripts.

key_files.name: README.md
key_files.role: Setup and usage instructions for running the fixture.

key_files.name: src/index.js
key_files.role: Client-side entry point; hydrates React app with assets and initial URL.

key_files.name: src/components/App.js
key_files.role: Main app component managing routing, Navigation API interception, and transition types.

key_files.name: src/components/Chrome.css
key_files.role: Global styles including view-transition pseudo-element rules.

concerns: Missing Chrome.js and Page.js component implementations (imported but not provided).
Missing server.js and loader/server.js files referenced in scripts but not shown.
Hard-coded copy of build artifacts from ../../build/oss-experimental/* in predev/prestart/prebuild scripts.
Navigation API feature detection uses loose check (typeof navigation === 'object') without null/undefined guards.
No test files present despite react-scripts test script defined in package.json.
